name: Dark Thila X MD
description: Multi-user WhatsApp Bot with dark dashboard UI — built on Baileys + Express + React.

NODE_ENV.description: Must be 'production' so the API server serves the built frontend.

JWT_SECRET.description: Secret key for signing dashboard login tokens. Use a long random string.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Express session secret. Defaults to JWT_SECRET if unset.

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string for the user store (optional — bot works without it).

MONGODB_URI.description: MongoDB connection string for persistent Baileys auth state. STRONGLY recommended on Heroku/Railway — without it, WhatsApp sessions are lost on every redeploy.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google AI Studio API key for the AI chat feature (.ai command). Free tier available at https://aistudio.google.com

LOG_LEVEL.description: Pino log level: trace | debug | info | warn | error
